	lcall jump_3DD6
	mov A, R6
	orl A, R7
	add A, #0FFh	; 255   -1 'ÿ'
	mov 20h.7, C
jump_0508:
	mov R7, 0FBh
	mov A, #26h	;  38 '&'
	add A, R7
	mov R0, A
	mov A, @R0
	mov R7, A
	mov @R0, 20h
	jb 20h.7, jump_054E
	mov 20h, R7
	jnb 20h.7, jump_054E
	jnb 20h.0, jump_054E
	jb 20h.4, jump_054E
	jb 20h.3, jump_054E
	clr A
	mov 0FFh, A
	mov 0FCh, #0C2h	; 194  -62 'Â'
jump_0529:
	mov A, 0FCh
	jnb 0E0h.0, jump_0529
	mov R7, 0FEh
	mov A, R7
	jb 0E0h.3, jump_054E
	mov R6, 0FDh
	orl A, #08h	;   8
	mov 0FEh, A
	mov 0FCh, #80h	; 128 -128
jump_053D:
	mov A, 0FCh
	jnb 0E0h.0, jump_053D
	mov 0FEh, R7
	mov 0FDh, R6
	mov 0FCh, #80h	; 128 -128
jump_0549:
	mov A, 0FCh
	jnb 0E0h.0, jump_0549
jump_054E:
	inc 0FBh
	mov R7, 0FBh
	mov A, R7
	clr C
	subb A, #04h	;   4
	jnc jump_055B
	ljmp jump_44C4

jump_055B:
	clr A
	mov 0FBh, A
	ret

	mov A, 7Eh
	anl A, #0Fh	;  15
	xrl A, #01h	;   1
	jnz jump_058A
	mov A, 7Eh
	jnb 0E0h.4, jump_058A
	mov DPTR, #dptr_47CF
	movx A, @DPTR
	orl A, #02h	;   2
	movx @DPTR, A
	anl A, #0FBh	; 251   -5 'û'
	movx @DPTR, A
	mov DPTR, #dptr_47D3
	movx A, @DPTR
	orl A, #04h	;   4
	movx @DPTR, A
	mov R3, #03h	;   3
	mov R5, #5Bh	;  91 '['
	mov R7, #5Dh	;  93 ']'
	lcall jump_3628
	mov R3, #0Eh	;  14
	sjmp jump_05A6

jump_058A:
	mov DPTR, #dptr_47CF
	movx A, @DPTR
	anl A, #0FDh	; 253   -3 'ý'
	movx @DPTR, A
	orl A, #04h	;   4
	movx @DPTR, A
	mov DPTR, #dptr_47D3
	movx A, @DPTR
	anl A, #0FBh	; 251   -5 'û'
	movx @DPTR, A
	mov R3, #02h	;   2
	mov R5, #5Bh	;  91 '['
	mov R7, #5Dh	;  93 ']'
	lcall jump_3628
	mov R3, #06h	;   6
jump_05A6:
	mov R5, #60h	;  96 '`'
	mov R7, #63h	;  99 'c'
	lcall jump_3628
	ret

	mov A, 7Eh
	jnb 0E0h.5, jump_05E8
	jnb 0E0h.4, jump_05C1
	mov R3, #02h	;   2
	mov R5, #33h	;  51 '3'
	mov R7, #35h	;  53 '5'
	lcall jump_3628
	sjmp jump_05D1

jump_05C1:
	mov R3, #01h	;   1
	mov R5, #33h	;  51 '3'
	mov R7, #35h	;  53 '5'
	lcall jump_3628
	mov DPTR, #dptr_47D1
	movx A, @DPTR
	orl A, #04h	;   4
	movx @DPTR, A
jump_05D1:
	mov DPTR, #dptr_47D1
	movx A, @DPTR
	anl A, #0F7h	; 247   -9 '÷'
	movx @DPTR, A
	mov DPTR, #dptr_47D0
	movx A, @DPTR
	orl A, #10h	;  16
	movx @DPTR, A
	mov R3, #05h	;   5
	mov R5, #84h	; 132 -124
	mov R7, #86h	; 134 -122
	lcall jump_3628
jump_05E8:
	ret

	mov R3, A
	mov A, 1Ch
	addc A, #0F0h	; 240  -16 'ð'
	mov R2, A
	mov R5, #10h	;  16
	mov R7, #07h	;   7
	ret

	anl A, #01h	;   1
	swap A
	rlc A
	anl A, #0E0h	; 224  -32 'à'
	mov 0DBh, A
	orl A, #08h	;   8
	mov 0DBh, A
	ret

	mov 0DBh, A
	mov 0DBh, #08h	;   8
	mov 0DBh, A
	mov 0DBh, #08h	;   8
	ret

	mov R3, 07h
	mov R2, 06h
	mov R5, #10h	;  16
	mov R7, #07h	;   7
	lcall jump_3ED9
jump_0617:
	mov R3, #0FFh	; 255   -1 'ÿ'
	mov R5, #10h	;  16
	mov R7, #07h	;   7
	lcall jump_3DD6
	mov A, R7
	orl A, R6
	jz jump_0617
	ret

	lcall jump_44C1
	jnb 21h.4, jump_062E
	lcall jump_4211
jump_062E:
	mov R0, #0C4h	; 196  -60 'Ä'
	mov A, @R0
	mov R7, A
	jz jump_0637
	lcall jump_4024
jump_0637:
	ret

	mov A, 19h
	add A, #17h	;  23
	anl A, #1Fh	;  31
	orl A, #80h	; 128 -128
	mov R7, A
	ret

	mov A, #2Ah	;  42 '*'
	add A, 19h
	mov R0, A
	mov A, @R0
	ret

	lcall jump_4671
	lcall jump_4667
	mov DPTR, #dptr_47F9
	movx A, @DPTR
	anl A, #0F8h	; 248   -8 'ø'
	orl A, #02h	;   2
	movx @DPTR, A
	ret

	mov A, 7Eh
	mov R6, 7Dh
	mov R0, #04h	;   4
	ret

	xch A, R6
	mov C, 0E0h.7
	rrc A
	xch A, R6
	rrc A
	ret

	clr A
	mov R0, #0C4h	; 196  -60 'Ä'
	mov @R0, A
	clr 21h.5
	mov R0, #0C1h	; 193  -63 'Á'
	mov @R0, A
	ret

	clr 21h.4
	clr 21h.3
	ret

	ret


end
